name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Classic Roman pasta with eggs, cheese, pancetta and black pepper.
instructions: Cook spaghetti al dente. Fry pancetta until crispy. Mix eggs and cheese. Combine pasta with pancetta off heat, add egg mixture, toss vigorously. Season with black pepper.

reviews.author: Alice
reviews.text: Absolutely delicious! The pasta was perfectly creamy and the pancetta added great depth. Will make again!

reviews.author: Bob
reviews.text: Loved this recipe, so rich and satisfying. The technique of adding egg off heat is key.

reviews.author: Carol
reviews.text: A bit too salty for my taste, but overall very good. The texture was perfect.

reviews.author: Dave
reviews.text: Classic and comforting. Followed the recipe exactly and it turned out wonderful.

reviews.author: Eve
reviews.text: Not the healthiest meal but incredibly tasty. Great for a special occasion.

name: Vegan Buddha Bowl
description: Nourishing bowl with quinoa, roasted vegetables, chickpeas and tahini dressing.
instructions: Cook quinoa. Roast sweet potato and chickpeas with olive oil and spices. Massage kale with lemon. Assemble bowls, drizzle with tahini dressing.

reviews.author: Fiona
reviews.text: So fresh and vibrant! Love all the colors and flavors. The tahini dressing is amazing.

reviews.author: George
reviews.text: Great healthy meal. Very filling and satisfying despite being plant-based.

reviews.author: Hannah
reviews.text: The roasted chickpeas are addictive! I make extra every time.

reviews.author: Ivan
reviews.text: Good but I wish there was more protein. Will add tofu next time.

reviews.author: Julia
reviews.text: Perfect meal prep recipe. Made a big batch for the whole week. Love how customizable it is.

name: Keto Chicken Alfredo
description: Low-carb version of chicken alfredo using zucchini noodles and rich cream sauce.
instructions: Spiralize zucchini into noodles. Season and pan-fry chicken. Make alfredo sauce with butter, cream, and parmesan. Toss zucchini noodles and chicken in sauce.

reviews.author: Kevin
reviews.text: Amazing keto alternative! Didn't miss the pasta at all. The sauce is so creamy.

reviews.author: Laura
reviews.text: Great low-carb comfort food. My whole family enjoyed it, even the non-keto ones.

reviews.author: Mike
reviews.text: The zucchini noodles release water, so make sure to salt them first. Recipe was delicious!

reviews.author: Nancy
reviews.text: Rich and satisfying. Perfect for a keto lifestyle without sacrificing flavor.

reviews.author: Oscar
reviews.text: Quick to make on weeknights. I use a store-bought spiralizer which saves time.

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
description: Trendy brunch staple with creamy avocado on sourdough and perfectly poached eggs.
instructions: Toast bread. Mash avocado with lemon, salt, and pepper. Poach eggs in vinegar water. Top toast with avocado and egg, garnish with red pepper flakes and microgreens.

reviews.author: Penny
reviews.text: Simple and delicious. The poached egg makes it feel extra special.

reviews.author: Quinn
reviews.text: Classic brunch recipe. I add everything bagel seasoning for extra flavor.

reviews.author: Rachel
reviews.text: Perfect weekend breakfast. Easy to customize with different toppings.

reviews.author: Steve
reviews.text: Overrated in restaurants but amazing homemade. The avocado quality matters a lot.

reviews.author: Tina
reviews.text: My go-to breakfast. Quick, nutritious and absolutely delicious.

name: Pad Thai
description: Iconic Thai stir-fried noodles with shrimp, tofu, bean sprouts and peanuts.
instructions: Soak rice noodles. Stir-fry garlic and shrimp. Add tofu and scramble eggs. Add noodles, tamarind-fish sauce mixture, and bean sprouts. Top with peanuts, lime and green onions.

reviews.author: Uma
reviews.text: Authentic tasting! The tamarind makes all the difference. Better than restaurant takeout.

reviews.author: Victor
reviews.text: Great recipe but tamarind paste can be hard to find. Worth the effort!

reviews.author: Wendy
reviews.text: My family devoured this. Perfectly balanced sweet, sour and savory flavors.

reviews.author: Xavier
reviews.text: Good foundation recipe. I add extra chili for more heat.

reviews.author: Yara
reviews.text: Love this dish. The peanuts and lime at the end really elevate everything.

name: Greek Salad
description: Fresh Mediterranean salad with tomatoes, cucumber, olives, feta and herbs.
instructions: Chop vegetables into large chunks. Combine in bowl. Add olives and feta. Dress with olive oil, red wine vinegar and dried oregano.

reviews.author: Zoe
reviews.text: So fresh and simple! The quality of ingredients really shines. Perfect summer salad.

reviews.author: Adam
reviews.text: Great side dish. The kalamata olives and feta are a must for authenticity.

reviews.author: Beth
reviews.text: Light and refreshing. I make this all summer long.

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text: Classic and reliable. The oregano really makes this dish authentic.

reviews.author: Diana
reviews.text: Simple perfection. No dressing needed beyond olive oil and vinegar.

name: Beef Tacos
description: Classic Mexican ground beef tacos with salsa, cheese and fresh toppings.
instructions: Brown ground beef with onion and garlic. Season with cumin and chili powder. Warm tortillas. Assemble tacos with meat and desired toppings.

reviews.author: Ethan
reviews.text: Family favorite! We make taco night every week. Kids and adults love it.

reviews.author: Faye
reviews.text: Simple and delicious. I add jalapeños for some heat. Perfect weeknight meal.

reviews.author: Greg
reviews.text: Solid recipe. Using corn tortillas keeps it gluten-free. Tastes great.

reviews.author: Holly
reviews.text: Easy to customize for picky eaters. The seasoning blend is spot on.

reviews.author: Ian
reviews.text: Great tacos! I top mine with guacamole and pickled onions for extra flavor.

name: Vegetable Coconut Curry
description: Fragrant vegan curry with chickpeas, spinach and coconut milk over basmati rice.
instructions: Sauté onion, garlic and ginger. Add spices and bloom. Add tomatoes and coconut milk. Add chickpeas and simmer. Stir in spinach. Serve over basmati rice.

reviews.author: Jane
reviews.text: Incredibly fragrant and flavorful! The coconut milk makes it so creamy. Will definitely make again.

reviews.author: Karl
reviews.text: Great vegan comfort food. The spice blend is perfect - aromatic but not too hot.

reviews.author: Lisa
reviews.text: Made this for my vegan friend and everyone loved it. So hearty and satisfying.

reviews.author: Mark
reviews.text: Love how easy this is to make. I double the recipe and freeze portions.

reviews.author: Nina
reviews.text: Wonderful dish! The turmeric gives it such a beautiful golden color.

name: Teriyaki Salmon
description: Pan-seared salmon glazed with sweet teriyaki sauce, served with steamed broccoli.
instructions: Make teriyaki sauce with soy sauce, mirin, sake and brown sugar. Sear salmon skin-side down. Glaze with teriyaki and cook through. Steam broccoli. Garnish with sesame seeds.

reviews.author: Omar
reviews.text: Restaurant-quality at home! The teriyaki glaze is incredible. So easy to make.

reviews.author: Paula
reviews.text: Perfect weeknight dinner. Quick, healthy and absolutely delicious.

reviews.author: Rob
reviews.text: The sauce is perfect - just the right balance of sweet and savory.

reviews.author: Sara
reviews.text: This has become my go-to salmon recipe. The kids love the sweet glaze.

reviews.author: Tom
reviews.text: Great keto-friendly option. Nutritious and packed with flavor.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy chickpea falafel in a warm pita with hummus, vegetables and tahini sauce.
instructions: Blend soaked chickpeas with herbs and spices. Form into balls and fry until golden. Warm pita. Assemble wrap with falafel, hummus, vegetables and tahini drizzle.

reviews.author: Ursula
reviews.text: Best falafel I've ever made! Crispy outside, tender inside. The herb mix is perfect.

reviews.author: Val
reviews.text: Delicious and filling vegan option. The tahini sauce ties everything together.

reviews.author: Will
reviews.text: Labor intensive but worth every minute. Great for meal prep - freeze the falafel balls.

reviews.author: Xena
reviews.text: Fantastic flavors! I bake instead of fry for a healthier version.

reviews.author: Yasmin
reviews.text: Authentic tasting! Brings back memories of street food in Tel Aviv.

name: Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Arborio rice slow-cooked with wild mushrooms, white wine and parmesan.
instructions: Sauté shallots and mushrooms. Toast rice. Deglaze with white wine. Add warm broth ladle by ladle, stirring constantly. Finish with butter and parmesan.

reviews.author: Zack
reviews.text: Perfectly creamy! The technique of adding broth slowly really does make a difference.

reviews.author: Amy
reviews.text: Love this recipe. Wild mushrooms add so much depth and earthiness.

reviews.author: Ben
reviews.text: Requires patience but the result is restaurant-worthy. The parmesan finish is key.

reviews.author: Clara
reviews.text: My comfort food. I use porcini mushrooms for the most intense flavor.

reviews.author: Dan
reviews.text: Excellent recipe. Takes about 30 minutes of stirring but is absolutely worth it.

name: Cauliflower Fried Rice
description: Low-carb keto take on fried rice using riced cauliflower with eggs and vegetables.
instructions: Rice cauliflower in food processor. Stir-fry garlic and ginger. Add vegetables. Push aside and scramble eggs. Add cauliflower rice and soy sauce. Toss and garnish with green onions.

reviews.author: Emma
reviews.text: Surprisingly satisfying! Couldn't believe how much it tastes like real fried rice.

reviews.author: Frank
reviews.text: Great keto recipe. I add chicken and shrimp to make it a complete meal.

reviews.author: Grace
reviews.text: Love this lighter alternative. The sesame oil really adds authenticity.

reviews.author: Henry
reviews.text: My kids actually prefer this over regular fried rice now!

reviews.author: Isla
reviews.text: Quick and healthy weeknight dinner. I meal prep the cauliflower rice ahead.

name: Red Lentil Soup
description: Hearty vegan soup with red lentils, cumin, lemon and fresh herbs.
instructions: Sauté onion, garlic, carrot and celery. Add spices. Add lentils and broth. Simmer until lentils are soft. Blend partially. Finish with lemon juice and fresh parsley.

reviews.author: Jake
reviews.text: So warming and nourishing! The cumin and lemon combination is wonderful.

reviews.author: Kate
reviews.text: Perfect winter soup. Cheap, nutritious and incredibly delicious.

reviews.author: Leo
reviews.text: Better the next day! I always make a big pot on Sundays.

reviews.author: Mia
reviews.text: Extremely comforting. The texture from partial blending is perfect.

reviews.author: Noah
reviews.text: One of my favorite soups. Simple ingredients create something magical.

name: Chicken Shawarma
description: Spiced marinated chicken cooked until tender, wrapped in flatbread with garlic sauce.
instructions: Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices overnight. Roast or grill until cooked through. Slice and serve in warm flatbread with garlic sauce and vegetables.

reviews.author: Olivia
reviews.text: The marinade is everything! So fragrant and flavorful. Tastes just like the real thing.

reviews.author: Peter
reviews.text: Incredible flavors. I marinade for 24 hours for maximum taste.

reviews.author: Quinn
reviews.text: Family loved this! The garlic sauce is essential - don't skip it.

reviews.author: Rosa
reviews.text: Authentic and delicious. The spice blend is complex but balanced.

reviews.author: Sam
reviews.text: Great recipe! I use the leftovers for salads and rice bowls throughout the week.

name: Zucchini Noodles with Basil Pesto
description: Light and fresh zucchini noodles tossed with vibrant homemade basil pesto.
instructions: Spiralize zucchini. Make pesto by blending basil, pine nuts, parmesan, garlic and olive oil. Toss zucchini noodles with pesto. Add cherry tomatoes. Serve immediately.

reviews.author: Tara
reviews.text: Light, fresh and delicious! The homemade pesto is so vibrant and flavorful.

reviews.author: Ugo
reviews.text: Perfect summer dish. The zucchini noodles don't feel like a compromise at all.

reviews.author: Vera
reviews.text: Love this healthy take on pasta. The pesto recipe alone is worth saving.

reviews.author: Wade
reviews.text: So quick to make! Ready in 15 minutes. Great keto option.

reviews.author: Xia
reviews.text: Refreshing and satisfying. I add grilled chicken for extra protein.
